sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84941" key="polu/kleistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ´-κλειστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλείω</foreign> A) <sense id="n84941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">closely shut,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θάλαμοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:215" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">215</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
